summary: Dashboard displays in mobile narrow viewport with proper error state handling. Beta banner and verification prompt are present. Some palette inconsistencies with manifesto requirements.

violations.description: Dashboard background appears to be cream/white rather than the specified diner teal #9fd8d2 for public marketing surfaces. However, this may be acceptable for authenticated surfaces per M.universal.4.
Beta framing is present in the banner but could be more explicit - currently shows 'Flapjack Cloud is in public beta' which meets the requirement.

actions: Verify that authenticated dashboard surfaces are intentionally using a different palette than public marketing per M.universal.4
Confirm beta banner messaging adequately satisfies explicit beta framing requirement
Validate mobile narrow navigation drawer accessibility at 390px viewport
